productName: Legacy Truffles - DOH Compliant - Double Truffle - Larry Bird Kush - 3.5g
description: Cannabis caviar made from Larry Bird Kush: dense hybrid flower hand-dipped in oil, then dusted in a glittering coat of kief for a seriously strong, special-occasion smoke. Decadent and potent, with notes of apricot, earthy, and grape, leading into a versatile, anytime balance.
